meta.name: Service Storm
meta.headline: Run Your Entire Service Business
meta.description: Service Storm is the all-in-one platform built for the trades. Go from lead to quote, schedule to dispatch, and invoice to 5-star review—all with a single, easy-to-use tool.
meta.ogDescription: All-in-one platform to manage your service business operations, customer data, scheduling, and more.
meta.mission: Service Storm is redefining the field service industry by putting powerful technology within reach of every local business. We believe service pros deserve enterprise-grade tools—without the enterprise-sized price tag.
meta.brand_promise: Service Storm now handles the entire lifecycle of a dollar in your business. From website and marketing to operations and payments—one platform, one partner.

hero.headline: Run Your Entire Service Business
hero.description: Service Storm is the all-in-one platform built for the trades. Go from lead to quote, schedule to dispatch, and invoice to 5-star review—all with a single, easy-to-use tool.

feature_sections.heading: The All-In-One Toolkit
feature_sections.subtitle: Everything you need to run a professional service business, organized exactly how you work.

win-jobs.title: Win More Jobs, Faster
win-jobs.description: Stop letting new leads and complex quotes slow you down. Service Storm gives you the tools to respond instantly and professionally.

features.title: Instant Lead Capture
features.content: Embed a lead form on your website that feeds directly into Service Storm, so you never miss an opportunity.

features.title: Professional Quotes in Minutes
features.content: Use your pre-built Price Book with services and materials to generate accurate quotes on the spot.

features.title: 'Good, Better, Best' Options
features.content: Increase quote acceptance by 39% by offering customers multiple options. Let them choose and digitally sign, turning a quote into a job in one click.

operations.title: Master Your Operations
operations.description: Chaos in the office and field costs you time and money. Take control with intelligent scheduling and team management.

features.title: Drag-and-Drop Dispatching
features.content: Visualize your whole day, week, or month. Easily assign jobs and adjust schedules on the fly.

features.title: Smart Technician Assignment
features.content: Assign jobs based on category, skills, and qualifications. Ensure the right tech is sent to the right job, every time.

features.title: Mobile App for Your Crew
features.content: Technicians can clock in, view job details, create invoices, and capture photos—all from their phone, even when offline.

payments.title: Get Paid on Time
payments.description: Stop chasing payments. Make it easy for customers to pay you the moment the job is done.

features.title: Instant Invoicing
features.content: Generate and send professional invoices via text or email right from the job site.

features.title: Online & In-Person Payments
features.content: Accept credit cards online or use Tap to Pay on your phone. Choose your processor (Storm Pay or Stripe) and even give customers the option to cover processing fees.

features.title: Automated Reminders
features.content: Let the system follow up on overdue invoices for you, reducing payment times by up to 62%.

reputation.title: Build a 5-Star Reputation
reputation.description: Turn your hard work into your best marketing tool.

features.title: Automated Review Requests
features.content: Automatically text satisfied customers a link to leave a review on Google, Facebook, or Yelp.

features.title: Manage Reviews in One Place
features.content: See all your reviews as they come in and easily respond, helping you generate 3x more positive reviews.

features.title: Build Customer Trust
features.content: Real-time GPS tracking and automated notifications keep customers informed and confident throughout the service.

mobile-auto-detailing.heroSubtitle: Mobile auto detailing software for scheduling, route optimization, service packages, and customer management.

industry_feature_cards.title: Landscape Job Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage all your landscape projects in one place. Track job progress from initial consultation to final walkthrough, ensuring every detail is captured and nothing falls through the cracks.

industry_feature_cards.title: Inventory & Materials
industry_feature_cards.description: Never run out of plants or supplies
industry_feature_cards.content: Track your plants, mulch, stone, and equipment inventory in real-time. Set automatic reorder points for seasonal materials and keep your crews supplied with everything they need.

industry_feature_cards.title: Weather Integration
industry_feature_cards.content: Integrated weather forecasting helps you plan your schedule around rain and adverse conditions. Automatically notify clients of weather-related rescheduling to maintain clear communication.

industry_feature_cards.title: Irrigation Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage irrigation systems with specialized tools for design, installation, and maintenance. Track zones, components, and service history for each property to provide better service.

industry_feature_cards.title: Seasonal Service Planning
industry_feature_cards.content: Plan and schedule seasonal services like spring cleanups, fertilization, fall cleanup, and snow removal. Automatically remind clients when it's time for seasonal maintenance.

industry_feature_cards.title: Route Optimization
industry_feature_cards.description: Maximize crew efficiency with smart routing
industry_feature_cards.content: Optimize travel routes to minimize drive time between properties. Group nearby properties together and reduce fuel costs while serving more clients each day.

industry_feature_cards.title: Electrical Job Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage electrical projects from service calls to major installations. Track permit status, inspection schedules, and material requirements all in one centralized system.

industry_feature_cards.title: Parts & Inventory Tracking
industry_feature_cards.description: Never run out of critical components
industry_feature_cards.content: Track wire, fixtures, breakers, and electrical components. Monitor stock levels, set reorder alerts, and ensure your trucks are always stocked with what you need.

industry_feature_cards.title: Permit & Inspection Management
industry_feature_cards.description: Stay on top of compliance requirements
industry_feature_cards.content: Track permit applications, inspection schedules, and compliance documentation. Get automatic reminders for upcoming inspections and permit renewals.

industry_feature_cards.title: Smart Scheduling & Dispatch
industry_feature_cards.content: Schedule emergency calls, routine maintenance, and project work efficiently. Dispatch the right electrician with the right skills and equipment for each job.

industry_feature_cards.title: Electrician Licensing Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Track electrician licenses, certifications, and continuing education requirements. Get alerts before licenses expire to ensure compliance.

industry_feature_cards.title: Customer Communication Hub
industry_feature_cards.content: Send automated appointment reminders, job updates, and follow-ups. Share photos of completed work and make it easy for customers to approve quotes and pay invoices.

industry_feature_cards.title: Plumbing Job Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage everything from emergency repairs to bathroom remodels. Track job status, materials used, and customer communications all in one place.

industry_feature_cards.title: Parts & Inventory Control
industry_feature_cards.content: Track pipes, fixtures, fittings, and supplies across all vehicles and your warehouse. Set automatic reorder points and reduce trips back to the shop.

industry_feature_cards.title: Emergency Dispatch System
industry_feature_cards.content: Route emergency plumbing calls to the nearest available plumber. Send job details, customer history, and site information directly to their mobile device.

industry_feature_cards.title: Permit & Code Compliance
industry_feature_cards.content: Track permit requirements for installations and major repairs. Maintain compliance documentation and get reminders for inspection schedules.

industry_feature_cards.title: Plumber License Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Track master plumber licenses, journeyman credentials, and specialty certifications. Get alerts before licenses expire.

industry_feature_cards.title: Customer Communication
industry_feature_cards.content: Send automated appointment reminders, arrival notifications, and follow-ups. Make it easy for customers to approve estimates and pay invoices online.

industry_feature_cards.title: HVAC Job Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage repairs, installations, and maintenance contracts. Track equipment service history, warranty information, and customer preferences in one system.

industry_feature_cards.title: Parts & Equipment Inventory
industry_feature_cards.description: Stock the right parts for every job
industry_feature_cards.content: Track filters, refrigerant, compressors, and other HVAC parts across all service vehicles. Know what you have and what you need to reorder.

industry_feature_cards.title: Smart Scheduling System
industry_feature_cards.content: Schedule emergency repairs, routine maintenance, and installations efficiently. Route technicians based on skills, location, and equipment requirements.

industry_feature_cards.title: Equipment History Tracking
industry_feature_cards.description: Complete service records for every unit
industry_feature_cards.content: Track make, model, serial numbers, and complete service history for every HVAC system you maintain. Know exactly what work was done and when.

industry_feature_cards.title: Seasonal Demand Planning
industry_feature_cards.description: Prepare for busy heating and cooling seasons
industry_feature_cards.content: Forecast demand based on weather patterns and historical data. Schedule preventive maintenance during slow periods and optimize staffing for peak seasons.

industry_feature_cards.title: Project Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Track multiple projects simultaneously with task lists, milestones, and deadlines. Keep all project documentation, communications, and changes in one place.

industry_feature_cards.title: Subcontractor Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage relationships with subcontractors, track their work schedules, and coordinate multiple trades on the same project. Maintain insurance and licensing documentation.

industry_feature_cards.title: Estimating & Proposals
industry_feature_cards.content: Build detailed construction estimates with material costs, labor, and subcontractor pricing. Present professional proposals that win more jobs.

industry_feature_cards.title: Project Scheduling
industry_feature_cards.content: Create detailed project timelines, coordinate subcontractor schedules, and track progress. Identify potential delays before they become problems.

industry_feature_cards.title: Client Communication
industry_feature_cards.content: Share project updates, photos, and change orders with clients. Make it easy to get approvals and keep everyone on the same page.

industry_feature_cards.title: Recurring Service Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Set up monthly, quarterly, or custom service intervals for each customer. Automatically schedule visits and bill recurring treatments without manual work.

industry_feature_cards.title: Treatment Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Record chemicals used, pests treated, and recommendations for each property. Maintain complete service history for compliance and customer questions.

industry_feature_cards.title: Chemical Inventory Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Monitor chemical inventory levels, usage rates, and expiration dates. Ensure compliance with regulations and never run out of critical products.

industry_feature_cards.title: Compliance & Documentation
industry_feature_cards.content: Maintain all required pesticide application records, safety data sheets, and licensing documentation. Generate compliance reports automatically.

industry_feature_cards.title: Recurring Cleaning Scheduling
industry_feature_cards.content: Set up weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning schedules that repeat automatically. Manage one-time deep cleans and recurring maintenance in one system.

industry_feature_cards.title: Cleaning Team Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Assign teams to jobs based on skills and availability. Track who cleaned which properties and ensure consistent quality across all your teams.

industry_feature_cards.title: Customer Preferences Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Track cleaning preferences, special instructions, key codes, and pet information for each home. Ensure every team delivers personalized service.

industry_feature_cards.title: Supply Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Monitor inventory of cleaning products, equipment, and supplies. Know when to reorder and ensure teams never run out of what they need.

industry_feature_cards.title: Facility Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage cleaning schedules across multiple facilities and locations. Track specific requirements, access procedures, and contact information for each site.

industry_feature_cards.title: Shift & Crew Scheduling
industry_feature_cards.content: Schedule day porters, night crews, and specialized teams. Manage shift coverage, time-off requests, and ensure adequate staffing for every facility.

industry_feature_cards.title: Quality Control Inspections
industry_feature_cards.content: Create inspection checklists, track quality metrics, and document issues. Ensure consistent service quality across all facilities and crews.

industry_feature_cards.title: Contract Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage contract terms, service level agreements, and renewal dates. Track billable vs. completed services for accurate invoicing.

industry_feature_cards.title: Supply & Equipment Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Track cleaning supplies, equipment, and inventory across all your facilities. Optimize ordering and reduce waste with usage analytics.

industry_feature_cards.title: Client Communication Portal
industry_feature_cards.content: Give facility managers visibility into cleaning schedules, inspection results, and service tickets. Streamline communication and build trust.

industry_feature_cards.title: Work Order Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage work orders from creation to completion. Assign tasks, track status, and maintain complete records of all maintenance activities across properties.

industry_feature_cards.title: Preventive Maintenance
industry_feature_cards.content: Set up recurring maintenance tasks like HVAC servicing, gutter cleaning, and seasonal inspections. Never miss scheduled maintenance that prevents costly repairs.

industry_feature_cards.title: Vendor Coordination
industry_feature_cards.content: Coordinate with HVAC techs, plumbers, electricians, and other vendors. Track vendor performance, insurance, and licensing documentation.

industry_feature_cards.title: Property Documentation
industry_feature_cards.content: Store equipment manuals, warranty information, and maintenance history for each property. Access everything you need instantly.

industry_feature_cards.title: Tenant Communication
industry_feature_cards.content: Let tenants submit maintenance requests online with photos. Keep them informed of work order status and completion automatically.

industry_feature_cards.title: Installation Project Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage camera, alarm, and access control installations from quote to completion. Track equipment, wiring, and configuration for every system.

industry_feature_cards.title: System Documentation
industry_feature_cards.content: Store system diagrams, equipment lists, access codes, and configuration details for every installation. Access everything instantly for service calls.

industry_feature_cards.title: Service Call Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Schedule and dispatch technicians for service calls, annual inspections, and system upgrades. Track service history for warranty and compliance.

industry_feature_cards.title: Equipment & Inventory
industry_feature_cards.content: Manage inventory of cameras, control panels, sensors, and accessories. Track which equipment is installed where and what's in stock.

industry_feature_cards.title: Customer Portal
industry_feature_cards.content: Give customers access to their system documentation, monitoring status, and service history. Allow easy scheduling of service calls and payments.

industry_feature_cards.title: GPS Route Optimization
industry_feature_cards.content: Automatically route mobile mechanics to appointments efficiently. Reduce fuel costs and maximize repairs per day with intelligent routing.

industry_feature_cards.title: Digital Vehicle Inspections
industry_feature_cards.content: Perform multi-point inspections on customer vehicles and share results with photos. Create professional inspection reports that build trust.

industry_feature_cards.title: On-Site Appointment Scheduling
industry_feature_cards.content: Let customers book mobile repair appointments online. Schedule jobs based on mechanic location and route optimization.

industry_feature_cards.title: Real-Time Customer Updates
industry_feature_cards.content: Send arrival notifications, repair updates, and completion confirmations automatically. Accept payments on-site with mobile processing.

industry_feature_cards.title: Pet Profile Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Track breed, temperament, grooming preferences, health issues, and special instructions for each pet. Deliver personalized service every time.

industry_feature_cards.title: Appointment Scheduling
industry_feature_cards.content: Let customers book mobile grooming appointments online. Send automatic reminders and manage recurring grooming schedules.

industry_feature_cards.title: Recurring Grooming Plans
industry_feature_cards.content: Set up recurring grooming schedules based on pet needs. Automate scheduling and billing for monthly or bi-monthly grooming appointments.

industry_feature_cards.title: Service Package Management
industry_feature_cards.content: Create and manage detailing packages from basic wash to premium details. Track which services each customer prefers.

industry_feature_cards.title: Recurring Detail Plans
industry_feature_cards.content: Set up monthly or quarterly detailing plans for customers who want regular service. Automate scheduling and billing.

industry_feature_cards.title: Product & Supply Tracking
industry_feature_cards.content: Track cleaning products, waxes, and supplies on your mobile detailing van. Monitor usage and reorder automatically.

industry_feature_cards.title: Before/After Documentation
industry_feature_cards.content: Capture before and after photos for every detail. Share results with customers and use them for marketing.

faq.question: How much does Service Storm cost?
faq.answer: We offer two subscription tiers: Standard Seats at $29/user/month and Premium Seats at $59/user/month. For a limited time, we're offering 60% off (normally $75 and $150) until January 1, 2026. All plans include full access to scheduling, quoting, invoicing, and customer management features.

faq.question: What's the difference between Standard and Premium seats?
faq.answer: Standard Seats include all core features like CRM, scheduling, invoicing, quoting, and team management. Premium Seats add AI-powered assistance, white-glove support, dedicated success manager, early access to new features, advanced analytics, custom integrations, and priority feature requests.

faq.question: How do I get started?
faq.answer: Create an account and select your subscription plan. You'll get instant access to the platform including scheduling, quoting, invoicing, and all core features. Setup takes just a few minutes, and our support team is here to help.

faq.question: Are there any additional fees?
faq.answer: Your monthly subscription covers full platform access. When you use our integrated payment processing tools, standard payment processing fees apply. Optional add-ons like in-person onboarding ($9,000 one-time) are available but not required.

faq.question: What kind of support do you offer?
faq.answer: Standard Seats include support during business hours. Premium Seats get priority white-glove support, a dedicated success manager, and priority feature requests. All customers get access to our support team via email and chat.

faq.question: Can I add my whole team?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add as many team members as you need—dispatchers, techs, admins, etc. Each user requires a seat, and all team members must be on the same plan type (either all Standard or all Premium).

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time with no long-term contracts or cancellation fees. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period.

spring_marketing.title: Service Storm Spring Marketing Kit
spring_marketing.intro: Spring brings longer days, better weather—and for many homeowners, extra cash from tax refunds. For contractors, it's the perfect time to ramp up marketing, upsell seasonal services, and book out the busy months ahead.
spring_marketing.subtext: Learn how smart contractors are using this window of opportunity to land more jobs, offer high-converting promotions, and turn 'spring fever' into a surge of revenue.
stats: 68% of Americans view tax refunds as 'found money'
40% of homeowners plan to use at least a portion of refunds for home improvements
27% higher average project value during spring vs winter
41% reduction in seasonal cash flow gaps
ai_features: Drafts emails, estimates, job descriptions, and customer responses in seconds.
Instantly reads customer requests and suggests services and materials for faster, more accurate bids.
Offer to match a percentage of customers' tax refunds when applied to projects (up to a set dollar amount).
Provide discounts for customers who schedule summer projects during spring.
Success stories from previous tax season customers
Create an organized inventory system with AI-generated material categories
AI recommendations should always be reviewed by humans before finalizing. Think of AI as an assistant, not a replacement for your expertise.
Service Storm: AI for the Trades
Service Storm takes the best of AI and puts it where it matters—right in your scheduling, quoting, and communication tools.
Service Storm gives you the power of AI without the learning curve, designed specifically for your industry's unique challenges and opportunities.
